mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_flight_history (user_id, departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code, behavior_type, flight_number, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{departureAirportCode}, #{arrivalAirportCode}, #{behaviorType}, #{flightNumber}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT departure_airport_code || '-' || arrival_airport_code AS route FROM user_flight_history WHERE behavior_type = 'SEARCH' GROUP BY departure_airport_code, arrival_airport_code ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
